mapper.insert: INSERT INTO waiting_queue (patient_id, department_id, queue_number, status, queued_at) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{departmentId}, #{queueNumber}, #{status}, #{queuedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, department_id, queue_number, status, queued_at, called_at, completed_at FROM waiting_queue WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(queue_number), 0) FROM waiting_queue WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND DATE(queued_at) = CURRENT_DATE
